task_completion.description: Verify that the sales data has been loaded into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data' pane on the right side of the Power BI interface shows the 'sales_data' table expanded, displaying columns such as Product_Category, Sales_Amount, Sale_Date, Unit_Price, Quantity_Sold, and Payment_Method.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Avg_Unit_Price' DAX measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Data' pane, there is a field named 'Avg_Unit_Price' with a small calculator icon next to it, indicating it is a calculated measure.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sales Overview' page contains the required chart visuals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page named 'Sales Overview' (visible in the bottom page tabs) contains a Clustered Column Chart with 'Sales_Amount' on the Y-axis and 'Product_Category' on the X-axis, and a Line Chart with 'Sales_Amount' on the Y-axis and 'Sale_Date' on the X-axis.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Category Detail' page is created, configured as a tooltip, and contains the required visuals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page named 'Category Detail' exists. The page canvas appears smaller than a standard page (indicating tooltip size). It contains two Card visuals (displaying values for Avg_Unit_Price and Quantity_Sold) and a Stacked Bar Chart showing Sales_Amount by Payment_Method.

task_completion.description: Verify the Clustered Column Chart is configured to use the custom tooltip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Either the formatting pane for the Clustered Column Chart shows 'Tooltip' enabled with 'Page' set to 'Category Detail', OR a screenshot shows the user hovering over a column in the chart and the 'Category Detail' page visuals appearing as a popup tooltip.

task_completion.description: Verify the report is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop window title bar at the top displays 'Tooltip_Report' or 'Tooltip_Report.pbix'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Power BI GUI to build the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Power BI interface, dragging fields, and configuring visuals in the formatting pane, rather than running scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify the visuals display the actual dataset values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts show realistic categories (e.g., Furniture, Food, Clothing, Electronics) and payment methods (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) rather than placeholder or mock text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy or download a completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a visible progression of the report being built step-by-step across multiple screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 1000 rows of realistic sales data with categories like Furniture, Food, Clothing, Electronics, and payment methods like Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer. The 'Category Detail' page must be configured as a tooltip page, which typically changes its canvas size to be smaller than a standard page. The verifier expects the model to contain a measure and the pages to have specific visual types.
